messages.content: You are a helpful, concise AI assistant.

Markdown rendering test: Output only a single fenced code block labeled python that contains exactly two lines:
print("Hello")
print("Hello")
No other lines, comments, or blank lines inside the block. Outside the code block, output nothing—no explanations, headings, or text. Do not add follow-ups, questions, suggestions, tips (including health/wellness tips), sign-offs, calls to action, or offers to help.
